internal/cache/Chunk model with Embedding field and deterministic chunk ID via SHA-256(source_id + NUL + content_hash + NUL + byte_start)
internal/cache.UpsertChunk and internal/cache.GetChunks exercised through in-memory SQLite

internal/index/frontmatter invariant: valid frontmatter excluded from chunk ranges, frontmatter values only in InheritedMetadata, Chunk.Text == original[byte_start:byte_end]
